mapping_description: This mapping loads the data from NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_GS_DATA to the Stage table ST_CG1_XXSCM_PL_GS_DATA

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CXPGD.SESSION_ID, 
CXPGD.SESSION_CODE, 
CXPGD.RULE_NAME, 
CXPGD.RULE_TYPE, 
CXPGD.RULE_SEQUENCE, 
CXPGD.RULE_ID, 
CXPGD.ACTION_TYPE, 
CXPGD.ORGANIZATION_ID, 
CXPGD.ORGANIZATION_CODE, 
CXPGD.BUSINESS_ENTITY, 
CXPGD.SHIP_TO_COUNTRY, 
CXPGD.SHIP_TO_REGION, 
CXPGD.CUSTOMER_ID, 
CXPGD.SRC_FROM_VALUE, 
CXPGD.COMPLIANCE_ID, 
CXPGD.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
CXPGD.COUNTRY, 
CXPGD.REGION, 
CXPGD.INVENTORY_ITEM_NAME, 
CXPGD.HEADER_ID, 
CXPGD.SHIP_SET_ID, 
CXPGD.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, 
CXPGD.LINE_ID, 
CXPGD.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID, 
CXPGD.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID, 
CXPGD.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID, 
CXPGD.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID, 
CXPGD.GEVC_COMPLIANT_FLAG, 
CXPGD.TAA_COMPLIANT_FLAG, 
CXPGD.CREATION_DATE, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN1, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN2, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN3, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN4, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN5, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN6, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN7, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN8, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN9, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN10, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN11, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN12, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN13, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN14, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN15, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN16, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN17, 
CXPGD.N_COLUMN18, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN1, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN2, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN3, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN4, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN5,
CXPGD.C_COLUMN6,
CXPGD.C_COLUMN7, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN8, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN9, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN10, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN11, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN12, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN13, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN14, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN15, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN16, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN17, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN18, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN19, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN20, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN21, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN22, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN23, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN24, 
CXPGD.C_COLUMN25, 
CXPGD.D_COLUMN1, 
CXPGD.D_COLUMN2, 
CXPGD.D_COLUMN3, 
CXPGD.CREATED_BY_USER, 
CXPGD.ITEM_TYPE, 
CXPGD.TAA_ATTRIBUTE, 
CXPGD.CALLING_SOURCE, 
CXPGD.DSO_FLAG, 
CXPGD.HOLD_FLAG, 
CXPGD.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
CXPGD.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
  FROM
 $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_GS_DATA CXPGD
 where
CXPGD.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate'
AND
CXPGD.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
AND CXPGD.LINE_ID IS NOT NULL
